1.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter  contains(event.provider, $Event_Provider)
| filter if(not in("All", $Tenant), in(tenant, $Tenant), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "No CostCenter"), isNull(CostCenter), else:matchesPhrase(CostCenter,$CostCenter)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($AppName, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($AppName, "No AppName"), isNull(AppName), else:matchesPhrase(AppName,$AppName)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "No Portfolio"), isNull(Portfolio), else:matchesPhrase(Portfolio,$Portfolio)), else:true)
| filter if(not in("All", $Module), in(module, $Module), else:true)
| filter if(not in($Hostname, "All",""), matchesValue(billedEntityName, $Hostname), else:true)
| dedup {formatTimestamp(timestamp, format:"MM-dd-yyyy"), billedEntityId, module }, sort: { timestamp desc }
| summarize cost = sum(cost), by:{module}
| sort cost desc

5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter  contains(event.provider, $Event_Provider)
| filter if(not in("All", $Tenant), in(tenant, $Tenant), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "No CostCenter"), isNull(CostCenter), else:matchesPhrase(CostCenter,$CostCenter)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($AppName, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($AppName, "No AppName"), isNull(AppName), else:matchesPhrase(AppName,$AppName)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "No Portfolio"), isNull(Portfolio), else:matchesPhrase(Portfolio,$Portfolio)), else:true)
| filter if(not in("All", $Module), in(module, $Module), else:true)
| filter if(not in($Hostname, "All",""), matchesValue(billedEntityName, $Hostname), else:true)
| dedup {formatTimestamp(timestamp, format:"MM-dd-yyyy"), billedEntityId, module }, sort: { timestamp desc }
| Fields billedTime = toTimestamp(UTCBilleddate), cost, module, UTCBilleddate
| makeTimeseries Cost = sum(cost), by:{module}, time: toTimestamp(billedTime), interval: 1d

11.title: Hosts Cost - TOP 1000
11.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter  contains(event.provider, $Event_Provider)
| filter if(not in("All", $Tenant), in(tenant, $Tenant), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "No CostCenter"), isNull(CostCenter), else:matchesPhrase(CostCenter,$CostCenter)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($AppName, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($AppName, "No AppName"), isNull(AppName), else:matchesPhrase(AppName,$AppName)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "No Portfolio"), isNull(Portfolio), else:matchesPhrase(Portfolio,$Portfolio)), else:true)
| filter if(not in("All", $Module), in(module, $Module), else:true)
| filter if(not in($Hostname, "All",""), matchesValue(billedEntityName, $Hostname), else:true)
| dedup {formatTimestamp(timestamp, format:"MM-dd-yyyy"), billedEntityId, module }, sort: { timestamp desc }
| summarize `Server Cost` = sum(cost), by:{`Tenant` = tenant,`Module` = module, `Host ID` = billedEntityId, `Host Name` = billedEntityName,`Cost Center` = CostCenter,`AppName` = AppName,`Portfolio` = Portfolio}
| sort `Server Cost` desc
| limit 1000

12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter  contains(event.provider, $Event_Provider)
| filter if(not in("All", $Tenant), in(tenant, $Tenant), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($CostCenter, "No CostCenter"), isNull(CostCenter), else:matchesPhrase(CostCenter,$CostCenter)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($AppName, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($AppName, "No AppName"), isNull(AppName), else:matchesPhrase(AppName,$AppName)), else:true)
| filter if(not matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "All"), if( matchesPhrase($Portfolio, "No Portfolio"), isNull(Portfolio), else:matchesPhrase(Portfolio,$Portfolio)), else:true)
| filter if(not in("All", $Module), in(module, $Module), else:true)
| filter if(not in($Hostname, "All",""), matchesValue(billedEntityName, $Hostname), else:true)
| dedup {formatTimestamp(timestamp, format:"MM-dd-yyyy"), billedEntityId, module }, sort: { timestamp desc }
| fieldsAdd module = if(isNotNull(module), module, else: "No module")
| summarize cost = sum(cost), by:{module}
| sort cost desc
